name: The King Of Mountains
description:
SPECIAL CONTAINMENT PROCEDURE

SCP-1529's native environment is to be kept under telescope and satellite surveillance whenever weather and daylight permit. Year-round telescope surveillance is to be conducted from the Foundation's permanent monitoring stations in ███████████, Nepal and ████████████, People's Republic of China. As early in the year as weather permits, a Foundation front company, South Chomolungma Portage, shall establish forward monitoring stations at base camp on the northern and southern ascents, and at the higher camps as weather permits (with the exception of Camp VI on the northern ascent and Camp IV on the southern), to be maintained until weather conditions force the evacuation of the mountain for the season. When SCP-1529 is active, telescope surveillance will be conducted by means of an automatic telescope with a video feed playing at seven seconds delay to avoid a repeat of Incident 1529-2. When necessary and safe, surveillance shall be conducted by airplane or helicopter.

APPEARANCE

SCP-1529 appears as an average-sized humanoid dressed entirely in white mountaineering gear, including a hooded parka and oversized opaque black goggles. Its face and body remain completely obscured, and it has never been observed wearing any other attire. Due to limited direct observations—primarily through telescopic surveillance—it's unclear whether these garments are clothing or part of its physiology

ABILITES AND ANOMALOUS PROPERTIES

  • Mind Manipulation: Individuals who make eye contact with SCP-1529 experience a hypnotic effect, feeling an unnatural warmth and comfort that compels them to rest. This trance-like state leads to rapid onset of hypothermia, resulting in death within 1–2 hours. 

  • Biological Manipulation: The entity can drastically reduce a victim's body temperature upon eye contact, inducing extreme hypothermia and frostbite much faster than typical environmental exposure would. There are implications that it can also induce cerebral edema in victims. 

  • Clairvoyance and Telepathy: SCP-1529 becomes aware of individuals on the mountain, even from telescopic distances. It can communicate by sending images and feelings to its intended recipient, including memories of itself and prior victims.
